item.name: Rainbow Pipira
item.description:
This voracious freshwater fish menaces the deeper regions of Marsh Ligaka.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Despite its undeniable aesthetic appeal, this species is entirely unsuited for aquariums─primarily due to its penchant for frenzied aggression. When encountering their prey, these wavekin attack en masse, leaving nary a scale behind.
